response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in full-stack web development and DLang, but he lacks the mandatory 5 to 10 years of hands-on C++ experience on Windows required for this role. His professional C++ experience is limited to a brief 7-month stint nearly a decade ago, and he does not possess the required institutional capital markets or fixed income domain expertise.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience with strong architectural and full-stack capabilities.
Solid background in modern software practices including TDD, CI/CD pipelines, and trunk-based development.
Exposure to the financial technology sector through previous work at an investment platform (RIDE Capital).
concerns: Fails to meet the mandatory requirement of 5-10 years of C++ development, having only 7 months of professional C++ experience from 2014.
Lacks the required domain expertise in Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income systems.
Tech stack experience is heavily skewed towards web technologies (Node.js, TypeScript) rather than the required Windows C++ ecosystem.
